text:
魔神城を撃破しながらエピック国内を進む
守護輝士達。目指すは東西南北に座す砦。
最初に辿り着いた東の砦には
【若人】四天と名乗る少女の姿があった。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

魔神城を撃破しながらエピック国内を進む
守護輝士達。目指すは東西南北に座す砦。
最初に辿り着いた東の砦には
【若人】四天を名乗る少女の姿があった。

The Guardians continued to make their way into
the heart of the Land of Epyk as they rent Castrum
Demonica asunder. They had their sights set on
the fortresses situated in the North, South, East
and West, first arriving at the East Fortress where
they were met by a young girl calling herself an
Emissary of Apprentice the Vernal.
----------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

While they rent Castrum Demonica asunder, the Guardians had
their sights set on the fortresses situated in the North, South,
East and West, arriving first at the East Fortress where they
met a girl calling herself an Emissary of Apprentice the Vernal.
ダーク・エンペラッピーを撃破せよ！
異世界オメガ　エピック砂漠　東の砦
Alternate Dimension: Omega - Epyk Desert - East Fortress
